# MLX-Gen

> MLX-Gen is a local MLX image and video generation runtime for Apple Silicon, published as
> `mlx-gen` and exposed through the `mlxgen` CLI and Python helpers.

Use these docs to understand installation, local model setup, generation routing, model
capabilities, quantized prepared folders, Wan video behavior, and application integration.

## Core Docs

- [README.md](README.md): project overview, mflux credit, install commands, published model links, Wan TI2V/A14B notes, and ecosystem links.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): index for the documentation tree.
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md): first-run workflow for install, download, prepare, image generation, image editing, SeedVR2 upscaling, and Wan video.
- [docs/api.md](docs/api.md): `mlxgen` command surface, generation router, public tasks, internal I2I modes, I2I canvas policy, SeedVR2 shortest-edge/scale-factor upscaling plus softness and tiling controls, negative prompts, Qwen edit-version routing, outpaint/reframe status, Wan video sizes and I2V aspect-ratio behavior, route capabilities, generated-output records, and Python plan resolution.
- [docs/upscaling.md](docs/upscaling.md): SeedVR2 image upscaling guide with shortest-edge and scale-factor sizing, quality controls, and a real 5x source/output comparison.
- [docs/edit-capabilities.md](docs/edit-capabilities.md): current image-edit contact sheets, exact model/package statuses, and command logs for Qwen Image Edit, Qwen Image Edit 2509/2511, FLUX.2 Klein, and latent I2I rows. FIBO Edit is unsupported through unified `mlxgen generate` in the current release.
- [docs/model-management.md](docs/model-management.md): explicit download/prepare commands, generation from local files, local prepared folders, matching Hugging Face handle resolution, and missing-artifact errors.
- [docs/quantization.md](docs/quantization.md): complete published package matrix, q8/q4/BF16 policies, Wan TI2V/A14B package status, A14B q8 measured run, Bonsai ternary support, and model-family compatibility.
- [docs/python-integration.md](docs/python-integration.md): embedding MLX-Gen, AbstractVision integration, capability/canvas planning, negative prompts, progress callbacks, and threading guidance.
- [docs/faq.md](docs/faq.md): common questions about tasks, image-to-image mode selection, SeedVR2 sizing and quality controls, Qwen edit variants, negative prompts, I2I output sizing, `--image-strength`, outpaint/reframe status, Wan resolutions and prompting, model preparation, and package naming.
- [docs/troubleshooting.md](docs/troubleshooting.md): symptoms and fixes for missing files, local paths, I2I sizing, unsupported options, Wan video settings, LoRA, and transfer issues.

## Examples

- [docs/examples/spaceship-snow.md](docs/examples/spaceship-snow.md): reproducible model-backed T2I, I2I edit, multi-reference I2I, T2V A14B, and I2V A14B workflow with included assets.

## Operations

- [docs/huggingface-publishing.md](docs/huggingface-publishing.md): generated model cards, upload commands, and AbstractFramework repository naming.
- [docs/release.md](docs/release.md): release checklist, GitHub Release flow, and PyPI publishing.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): user-visible release history.

## Project

- [ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md](ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md): upstream mflux credit and model/community acknowledgements.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, checks, documentation expectations, and pull-request scope.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting and token/model safety guidance.
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): participation expectations.
- [docs/adr/README.md](docs/adr/README.md): architecture decision records, including model-backed smoke validation policy.
